$comment: OPTIONAL example MCP server config for connecting AEC Scholar to live scholarly APIs.
This file is NOT loaded automatically and is NOT referenced by plugin.json — it is a template.
Copy the entries you want into your own project .mcp.json (or use `claude mcp add`),
and replace each placeholder command/package with a REAL, vetted MCP server you trust.
Verify any server before use — it receives tool access. See mcp/README.md.

env.$comment_key: Optional: set SEMANTIC_SCHOLAR_API_KEY for higher rate limits
